sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85801" key="pornotelw/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πορνο-τελώνης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, at Athens, <sense id="n85801.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">farmer of the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πορνικὸν τέλος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0492.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philonid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl>: nickname for <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tax-gatherers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
